Stock Market Today, May 1: Tech Stocks Soar on Apple Earnings
These Are the Stocks Reporting Earnings Today - May 1, 2026

summary: S&P 500 rose to a fresh all-time high (above 7,200), up 0.5%; Nasdaq +1.1% at a new ATH; Dow slipped 70 pts. Apple beat Q2 earnings and guided higher, lifting tech. April was the best monthly performance since 2020 for S&P 500 and Nasdaq. Roblox tumbled 24% on guidance cut. Oil fell on Middle East ceasefire hopes via Pakistani mediators.
